news.headline: Crossmark's Doll warns of real potential US growth scare, says Bloomberg.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2% in the last quarter, marking a decrease of 0.5% from the previous quarter. This data suggests that the economy is showing signs of improvement, with a total of 250,000 new jobs being created during this period. Additionally, the report highlights that the average hourly wage has increased by 3.5% compared to the same period last year. Experts attribute this positive trend to various government initiatives aimed at boosting employment and economic growth.

news.headline: Newly created Stronvar Aerospace acquires Electro Methods Inc., led by CEO Craig Gallagher and CFO Gregor Goodwin, investment from Blackstone.
news.summary: Stronvar Aerospace, a new company based in South Windsor, Connecticut, has acquired Electro Methods Inc. (EMI) from its previous private owners. The acquisition, led by CEO Craig Gallagher and CFO Gregor Goodwin, both previously affiliated with MB Aerospace, aims to bolster the aero-engine supply chain sector. Stronvar Aerospace plans to enhance EMI's performance and drive growth through strategic investments. This move signifies a significant development for EMI under the new ownership. For more information, visit www.stronvaraerospace.com.

news.headline: OTC Markets Group adds ZRCN Inc. to OTCQX with 12,000 securities, ZRCN to trade on OTCQX Best Market.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that ZRCN Inc., a company specializing in digitally-enhanced hand-tools, has met the requirements to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. operates regulated trading markets for 12,000 U.S. and international securities. ZRCN Inc. (OTCQX: ZRCN) is now listed on this market.

news.headline: Kaspi.kz reports impressive financial results for 4Q & FY 2024: 4Q revenue & net income up 28% YoY, FY net income up 25%, revenue up 32%. Marketplace GMV up 39% &44% in 4Q &FY 2024. e-Commerce GMV up 67% & 85% YoY in 4Q & FY 2024. e-Grocery GMV up 97% in FY 2024. e-Cars GMV up 62% in 4Q 2024. Kaspi Travel GMV up 30% & 34% in 4Q & FY 2024.
news.summary: Kaspi.kz, operating Kaspi.kz and Kaspi Pay Super Apps, reported their consolidated financial results for 4Q 2024 and FY 2024. Net income for FY 2024 was up 25% YoY, with revenue up 32% YoY. In 4Q 2024, revenue and net income increased by 28% YoY. Marketplace GMV grew by 39% and 44% in 4Q and FY 2024, respectively. e-Commerce GMV rose by 67% and 85% YoY in 4Q and FY 2024. Kaspi Delivery orders increased by 128% YoY to 99 million in FY 2024. e-Cars GMV increased by 62% in 4Q 2024, reaching KZT239 billion. Kaspi Travel saw GMV grow by 30% and 34% YoY in 4Q 2024 and FY 2024. Payments transactions increased by 33% and 40% YoY in 4Q and FY 2024. B2B Payments were the fastest-growing segment. Payments and Marketplace Platforms accounted for 69% of consolidated net income in FY 2024, up from 66% in FY 2023. Kaspi continues to launch innovations like digital gift cards to boost engagement.

news.headline: By 2029, Polyethylene Terephthalate (PET) market is estimated at $64.01 billion and Polybutylene Terephthalate (PBT) market at $6.37 billion - per MarketsandMarkets™ report.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of February 24, 2025, a report on the Polyethylene Terephthalate (PET) & Polybutylene Terephthalate (PBT) Resins Market has been released. The report covers various aspects including PET types, PET applications such as bottles, films, and food packaging, as well as PBT applications like electrical & electronics, automotive, and consumer appliance industries. This comprehensive analysis spans across different regions and examines market trends, growth opportunities, and challenges within the PET and PBT resin sectors.

news.headline: Wallbox secures $10 million investment from Inversiones Financieras Perseo, S.L., Orilla Asset Management, and Enric Asunción, to enhance global expansion.
news.summary: Barcelona, Spain - Wallbox, a renowned company in electric vehicle (EV) charging and energy management solutions, has disclosed an investment worth around $10 million. Notable investors in this funding round are Inversiones Financieras Perseo, S.L. (a subsidiary of Iberdrola), Orilla Asset Management, and Enric Asunción, who serves as the CEO and Co-Founder. This substantial investment serves as a testament to the investors' trust in Wallbox's strategic direction and bolsters its financial standing as it pushes forward with its global expansion efforts.

Bright Minds Biosciences (NASDAQ: DRUG) to attend three healthcare conferences in March focusing on 5-HT2 agonists for CNS disorders.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Bright Minds Biosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: DRUG), headquartered in New York and Vancouver, disclosed its plans to attend three upcoming healthcare conferences. The company, specializing in the creation of precise 5-HT2 agonists for drug-resistant epilepsy and other CNS disorders, will be represented by CEO Ian McDonald and key executives. This strategic move aims to bolster their presence in the industry and showcase their innovations to a broader audience.

news.headline: MAG update: Deeper high-grade zones on main break, new zones at Larder project, large expansion of Carissa zone at Deer Trail.
news.summary: A recent discovery has confirmed the presence of deeper high-grade zones along the main break, with new regional zones identified at Larder. The Carissa Zone at Deer Trail has undergone a significant expansion, indicating a potential mineral source. These developments mark a substantial advancement in the understanding of the area's mineral potential.

news.headline: $145K grants awarded by FHLB Dallas and Red River Bank aim to solve property title issues for low-income families in Louisiana.
news.summary: In Metairie, Louisiana, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) in partnership with Red River Bank has announced a grant of $145,080 for the Heirs’ Property Program. Southeast Louisiana Legal Services will receive $100,000, East St. Tammany Habitat for Humanity will receive $20,080, and the United Way of Southeast Louisiana will receive $25,000. These grants aim to support low-income families in Louisiana by addressing heirs’ property title issues. The funds will also be utilized to offer assistance in creating simple wills.

news.headline: Matt Breslin appointed President, North America for IFS due to rising Industrial AI demand.
news.summary: Matt Breslin has been appointed to a key leadership role as demand for Industrial AI in North America increases. IFS, a top provider of enterprise cloud and Industrial AI software, made the announcement on Feb. 24, 2025 in London. This reflects the company's continued global growth.

news.headline: Brown & Brown, Inc. appoints Stephen P. Hearn as EVP and COO after his stint as a director.
news.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE: BRO) based in Daytona Beach, Florida, unveiled that Stephen P. Hearn, an experienced figure in the insurance sector, was appointed as executive vice president and chief operating officer on February 24, 2025. Hearn, who became part of the company's board of directors in August 2024, decided to step down from his directorial role to focus on his new position. He will be an essential member of the operating committee moving forward.

news.headline: BioNTech to unveil Q4 & FY 2024 results on March 10, 2025, with a conference call at 8:00 am EDT (1:00 pm CET).

The Company will conduct a conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. EDT (1:00 p.m. CET) on the same day for investors, financial analysts, and the public to review its financial outcomes and offer a corporate update.

news.headline: Essity bought 270,000 Class B shares between Feb 17-21, 2025, in buyback program.

news.headline: Vipshop's revenue falls for 3rd quarter, up just 16% in last 6 months during China tech stock rally.
news.summary: Vipshop Holdings Ltd., an e-commerce company, reported a third consecutive quarter of declining revenue in the last three months of 2024, but the declines are moderating. The stock has been relatively overlooked during the recent China tech rally, with only a 16% increase in the last six months compared to larger gains for competitors Alibaba and JD.com. Despite the decline in revenue and consumer caution in China, the company believes it could return to growth this year. Vipshop's latest quarterly report showed most major metrics falling, except for an increase in spending on promotions, which eroded margins. The company's Super VIP segment performed well, echoing Alibaba's results. Chairman Eric Shen expressed optimism for a positive trajectory this year but noted uncertainty. Vipshop's stock rose 1.4% after the quarterly report but has only increased by 16% in the last six months and is down 13.3% overall.

Melco is a prominent developer, owner, and operator of integrated resort facilities in Asia and Europe.

news.headline: MAC Copper Limited provides 2024 Resource/Reserve Statement and 2 Year Production Guidance for CSA Copper Mine in NSW.
news.summary: St. Helier, Jersey - MAC Copper Limited, a private company registered under the laws of Jersey, Channel Islands, trading as NYSE: MTAL and ASX: MAC, has shared its Resource and Reserve Statement as of December 31, 2024, along with a 2-Year Production Guidance for the CSA Copper Mine in NSW. As per the regulations outlined in Item 1300 of Regulation S-K (17 CFR Part 229), all Mineral Resources are disclosed separately from Mineral Reserves. The company's ARBN is 671 963 198.

news.headline: Westlake Chemical Partners LP (WLKP) reported $15.0 million net income in Q4 2024, with $132.5 million operating cash flows, up from Q4 2023.
news.summary: In Houston, Westlake Chemical Partners LP (NYSE: WLKP) announced that in the fourth quarter of 2024, they recorded a net income attributable to the Partnership of $15.0 million, translating to $0.43 per limited partner unit. This figure remained consistent with the net income reported in the fourth quarter of 2023, which stood at $14.3 million. Cash flows from operating activities also saw a notable rise in the fourth quarter of 2024, reaching $132.5 million. This marked an increase of $24.8 million when compared to the cash flows from operating activities in the fourth quarter of 2023.

In the three months ending December 31, 2024, the company reported net sales of $2.843 billion. For the twelve months ending December 31, 2024, Westlake Corporation's net sales stood at $x million. news.headline: Leader of German far-left Linke Party: We will have to discuss very seriously how far we are prepared to go on debt brake reform.
Global nasogastric tube market valued at $401.95 million in 2023, projected to reach $693.09 million by 2035 at 4.6% CAGR.
news.summary: An Allied Market Research report on the "Nasogastric Tube Market" reveals that in 2023, the market was valued at $401.95 million, and it is projected to reach $693.09 million by 2035 with a growth rate of 4.6% from 2024 to 2035. The primary growth factors include the increasing prevalence of chronic diseases and a rise in enteral feeding within home care services. The market growth is driven by factors like the prevalence of gastrointestinal disorders, advancements in tube materials, and higher hospitalization rates. However, complications from prolonged tube use could hinder market growth. The report also highlights the potential growth opportunities in emerging markets and the demand for home enteral nutrition.

news.headline: Global Diesel Oxidation Catalysts Market to grow at 3.1% CAGR, reaching USD 2,095 million by 2035, driven by stricter emissions regulations and demand for cleaner atmosphere. North America to capture 35.9% market share with an absolute opportunity of USD 206.5 million. Market focuses on catalyst durability, efficiency, and sustainability. Shift towards more advanced designs supporting high performance. Joint ventures and investments in research sector for cleaner energy sources on the rise.
news.summary: The global Diesel Oxidation Catalysts Market is projected to reach US$2,095 million by 2035, with a CAGR of 3.1%. This growth is driven by increased regulatory pressure to reduce emissions. The market focuses on catalyst durability and efficiency, with investments in innovative materials and technologies. Hybrid and electric vehicles are influencing market dynamics. North America is expected to capture 35.9% of market share in 2025, with an absolute opportunity of US$206.5 million. East Asia will account for 30.3% of the market. The market trend highlights a shift towards more advanced catalyst designs for high performance and sustainability, encouraging investments in cleaner energy sources.

news.headline: AZZ Inc. (NYSE: AZZ) to participate in 17th Annual Evercore ISI Industrial Conference and 37th Annual Roth Conference, key executives to attend.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas on February 24, 2025, AZZ Inc. (NYSE: AZZ) revealed significant news. They are recognized as the top independent supplier of hot-dip galvanizing and coil coating services in North America. AIS Resources to raise $100,000 in private placement financing at $0.035 per unit, appoints Marc Enright-Morin as CEO.
news.summary: A company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, A.I.S. Resources Limited, has disclosed a non-brokered private placement initiative. They plan to offer up to 2,857,143 Units priced at $0.035 each, aiming to generate $100,000 in total gross proceeds. The purpose behind this Private Placement is to utilize the funds for general working capital requirements.

news.headline: Hyperscale Data seeks options for Michigan Data Center with Northland Capital Markets.
news.summary: A large-scale data company has partnered with Northland Capital Markets to consider strategic alternatives for their data center located in Michigan. This move signifies the company's interest in exploring potential opportunities for growth and expansion. The data center in Michigan is a significant asset for the company, with a sizeable capacity and advanced infrastructure to support their operations. The partnership with Northland Capital Markets aims to evaluate different strategic options that could potentially enhance the company's position in the market and maximize value for stakeholders. The decision to engage in this process indicates a proactive approach towards optimizing the company's resources and leveraging its data center assets effectively. This strategic move comes at a time when the demand for data services is increasing, highlighting the potential for substantial growth opportunities in the data center industry. The company's collaboration with Northland Capital Markets underscores their commitment to exploring all avenues for strategic advancement and staying ahead in the competitive data market landscape.

news.summary: In Longueuil, Quebec, on February 24, 2025, Azimut Exploration Inc. (TSXV: AZM, OTCQX: AZMTF) disclosed the outcomes of its Annual General Meeting that occurred on February 20, 2025.

news.headline: American stock market futures rise as tech giants recover, details below.
Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. reported financial results for Q4 & full fiscal year 2024, ending Dec 27. Successful growth despite challenges.
news.summary: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. (NYSE: FDP) based in Coral Gables, Florida, has released its financial report for the fourth quarter and fiscal year that concluded on December 27, 2024. The company highlighted the impact of their strategic initiatives and operational enhancements on their performance throughout 2024. Despite encountering various obstacles during the year, Fresh Del Monte's success was largely attributed to the outstanding results from its fresh and value-added products division.

news.headline: Wall Street aims to rebound post Friday's selloff. Futures rise: Nasdaq 0.40%, S&P 0.50%, Dow Jones 0.68%, Russell 2000 0.82%. Analysts optimistic on economy's growth. NVDA to report Q4 earnings. Treasuries yields: 10-year 4.44%, 2-year 4.22%. Fed likely to maintain interest rates at 97.5% in March meeting. Notable declines in consumer sentiment, home sales, and PMIs. Index performance: Nasdaq -2.20%, S&P 500 -1.71%, Dow Jones -1.69%, Russell 2000 -2.95%. UNH under scrutiny. UMich index drops 10% to 64.7.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures rose on Monday after Friday's selloff, with all four benchmark indices showing an increase. Investor concerns over tariffs and a 10% decline in consumer sentiment data on Friday led to fears of a market correction. Nvidia Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is set to report its fourth-quarter earnings. The 10-year Treasury yield was at 4.44% and the two-year yield at 4.22%. The CME Group's FedWatch tool indicated a 97.5% chance of no interest rate change in the March meeting. Futures for Nasdaq 100, S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Russell 2000 showed positive changes. Shares of UnitedHealth Group Inc. (NYSE:UNH) dropped over 7% due to the Department of Justice’s investigation on Medicare billing practices. Several economic indicators, such as the University of Michigan consumer sentiment index and existing home sales, impacted the market's downturn. Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq Composite, and Russell 2000 all closed lower on Friday. Analyst Ed Yardeni mentioned a bearish sentiment due to uncertainty over the economy's resilience.

news.headline: XRP price dips 5% today. Resistance from 50-day SMA suggests further correction in the near future.
news.summary: Today, the price of XRP has decreased by 5%. Additionally, the resistance from the 50-day Simple Moving Average (SMA) suggests that there could be a more significant correction in the short term.

news.headline: 14 Berkshire Hathaway agents in SD named "Leaders of Influence in Real Estate" by San Diego Business Journal.
news.summary: Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties in San Diego celebrates the recognition of fourteen agents as "Leaders of Influence in San Diego Real Estate" by the San Diego Business Journal. The distinguished agents are top producers within the organization and are esteemed for their community engagement. President Martha Mosier highlighted their excellence in both professional success and community service.

news.headline: Owens Corning's full-year net sales reach $11B, earning $647M profit & $2B adjusted EBIT in 2024.
news.summary: Toledo-based Owens Corning (NYSE: OC) released their fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 financial results showing significant growth. Net sales reached $11.0 billion, marking a 13% increase compared to the previous year. The recently acquired doors business contributed $1.4 billion in revenue. The reported net earnings margin was 6%, while adjusted EBIT margin stood at 19% and adjusted EBITDA margin at 25%. The company delivered diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $7.37 and adjusted diluted EPS of $15.91. These impressive numbers demonstrate Owens Corning's strong performance in the residential and commercial building products sector.

news.headline: Election-year shake-up leaves federal workers in limbo, thousands at risk, experts advise survival plan.
news.summary: With election-year turbulence on the horizon, many federal employees are facing uncertainty, potentially impacting thousands of workers. As reported by PARWCC experts in St. Petersburg, Florida on February 24, 2025, the current situation is prompting concerns about reclassifications, job security, and hiring freezes. In such challenging times, it is essential for individuals to strategize for career survival. Experts suggest developing a proactive game plan to navigate the uncertainties, emphasizing the importance of upskilling, networking, and staying agile in the evolving job market. Amidst the whirlwind of changes, federal workers are urged to prepare themselves for potential shifts in their roles and responsibilities to ensure their professional resilience.

news.headline: Bluevine survey reveals strong confidence among US small businesses; strategic financial moves despite economic volatility.
news.summary: Bluevine recently released its 2024 End-Of-Year BOSS Report, revealing that small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) are effectively navigating through economic uncertainties by making strategic financial decisions. The report, based on data from various businesses, highlights how these SMBs are successfully managing their finances in the face of ongoing economic volatility. Located in Jersey City, N.J., Bluevine is recognized as a prominent banking platform that functions as the financial backbone for startups and small businesses. This report sheds light on the resilience of SMBs, showcasing their ability to adapt and thrive in challenging financial landscapes.
